fields.acceptance_criteria: New crate at tools/viewer/ticket-viewer/dioxus-frontend; Cargo.toml with dioxus 0.7 web + viewer-api-dioxus dep; Trunk.toml; index.html; builds and serves on dev port; ticket-viewer backend serves both old static/ and new dioxus WASM
fields.title: Arch: ticket-viewer dioxus-frontend crate scaffold with Trunk
